retry_reason: kmem_cache_destroy is unconditional and safe on NULL; no failure path exists, so retry is irrelevant.
contract_summary: Put-wrapper: releases the reference on the global br_fdb_cache slab cache by calling kmem_cache_destroy. This is the final cleanup for the FDB slab cache, typically called during module unload. After this call, the cache must not be used, and no further put operations are allowed. The caller must ensure no other references to the cache exist before invoking this function.
